message:
fix(shims): use subarray for Buffer.slice and getrandom for crypto randomness

Buffer.slice() now returns a view via subarray() instead of copying,
matching Node.js semantics where slice returns a view over the same
underlying ArrayBuffer — zero-copy, single call.  random_bytes() uses
getrandom::fill() directly instead of looping over Uuid::new_v4(),
reducing overhead and improving correctness by going straight to the
OS CSPRNG.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
